name: KB Graph Viewer
description: View the link graph for a knowledge base document (1-hop neighbors only). Shows outgoing references, incoming references, dangling links, and same-tag related documents.

function.name: kb_graph
function.description: View the link graph for a knowledge base document. Shows which documents this file references (outgoing), which documents reference it (incoming), any broken/dangling links, and related documents that share the same tags. Limited to 1-hop neighbors only.

filename.description: KB filename without path, e.g. 'howto-report.md' or 'notes.md'. Must be a .md file in the agent's knowledge base.

mock_response.result:
## KB Graph: howto-report.md

→ references (1):
  - changelog-format.md (Changelog Format) — last updated 3 days ago

↑ referenced by (1):
  - notes.md (User Notes)

Related by tag [guide]:
  - reminder-and-schedule-creation-rules.md (Schedule Creation Rules)
